subcodes.first_line: God hath indeed answered what thou didst desire from the wondrous bounties of His grace and the ocean of His forgiveness. Verily, He is the All-Bountiful, the Gracious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استجاب الله ما اردت من بدایع فضله و بحر غفرانه انه لجواد کریم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
